description_long: This object is a single slice of white layer cake, positioned upright on a large, round, flat plate. The cake features three visible layers of light, fluffy sponge separated by smooth, white frosting. The top of the slice is decorated with piped white icing, forming small peaks or rosettes, giving it a festive appearance. The sides of the cake are neatly frosted, and the interior layers are clearly defined, suggesting a moist and well-constructed dessert. The plate beneath is plain and circular, providing a clean presentation. The overall look is simple yet elegant, suitable for a celebration or casual urban café setting.
description: A single slice of white layer cake with piped icing on top, presented on a large, round plate. The cake has three layers separated by white frosting and a clean, elegant appearance.
description_view_0: The cake slice is seen from the back, showing the curved frosted edge and the piped icing on top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the three distinct cake layers and the piped icing, with the flat cut face of the slice visible.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the vertical layers of cake and frosting, with the piped icing visible on the top edge.
description_view_3: This angled view shows both the side and top of the cake slice, emphasizing the layered structure and decorative icing.
